task_completion.description: Create the OST_Distribution folder and its tracks subfolder on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows the directory path /home/ga/Desktop/OST_Distribution/tracks exists.

task_completion.description: Copy the 12 specified MP3 tracks into the tracks folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tracks folder is shown containing 12 MP3 files (e.g., 01_main_theme_vFINAL.mp3, 02_city_streets_mix2.mp3, etc.).

task_completion.description: Generate the soundtrack.xspf playlist file in the OST_Distribution folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file soundtrack.xspf is visible inside /home/ga/Desktop/OST_Distribution/.

task_completion.description: Set the XSPF playlist title and creator correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of soundtrack.xspf (visible in a text editor or terminal) show <title>Cyber-Neon: Original Soundtrack</title> and <creator>Neon Syndicate Games</creator>.

task_completion.description: Use relative paths for track locations in the XSPF file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The <location> tags in the XSPF file show relative paths starting with 'tracks/' (e.g., <location>tracks/01_main_theme_vFINAL.mp3</location>), not absolute paths.

task_completion.description: Use clean song names extracted from ID3 tags for track titles in the XSPF file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The <title> tags for individual tracks in the XSPF file show clean names like 'Cyber-Neon Main Theme' or 'Neon Skyline', rather than the raw filenames.

integrity.description: Verify that the copied tracks are actual files, not symlinks.
integrity.visual_evidence: In a file manager, the MP3 file icons do not have shortcut/symlink arrows, or a terminal `ls -l` command shows them as regular files (starting with '-') rather than links (starting with 'l').

integrity.description: Verify that the agent generated a proper XSPF XML structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: The XSPF file contents show standard XML tags like <?xml version="1.0"?>, <playlist>, <trackList>, and <track> rather than just a plain text list.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent extracted ID3 tags rather than hallucinating titles.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using a tool like ffprobe, mutagen, exiftool, a python script, or a media player to read the metadata of the MP3 files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected 12 tracks are: 01_main_theme_vFINAL.mp3 (Cyber-Neon Main Theme), 02_city_streets_mix2.mp3 (Neon Skyline), 03_combat_loop.mp3 (Alleyway Ambush), 04_hacking_minigame.mp3 (Data Breach), 05_stealth_v1.mp3 (Shadow Ops), 06_boss_fight_MASTER.mp3 (Corporate Overlord), 07_shop_theme.mp3 (Black Market), 08_safehouse.mp3 (Neon Dreams), 09_chase_sequence.mp3 (Highway Pursuit), 10_ending_credits.mp3 (Cyber-Neon Finale), 11_bonus_track_1.mp3 (Retro Grade), 12_bonus_track_2.mp3 (Synthwave Nights). The playlist title must be 'Cyber-Neon: Original Soundtrack' and creator 'Neon Syndicate Games'. Paths must be relative (e.g., 'tracks/01_main_theme_vFINAL.mp3').
